goal: 继续 /next：规划并推进 browser-brain-loop-next 下一批开发 slice

summary.title: 推进 /next：Mainline 指引与 Skill 安装载荷收口
summary.what: 在 live queue 为空后完成两轮 planning/claim/implement/closeout：ISSUE-170 安装 AGENTS.md 的 Mainline managed guidance；ISSUE-171 让 skills.* management 保留原始 control-plane input payload，并更新 core tests 与 Skill authoring docs。
summary.why: mainline init 后仓库级 AGENTS 指引仍是 not_installed，会影响后续 agent 触发正确 Mainline 工作流；Skill SDK 已有 install-only setup plan，但 core 把 skills.install 输入裁成 skillId，阻断 runtime manager 后续写入 BrowserVFS 的接线点。
summary.user_goal: 继续 /next：规划并推进 browser-brain-loop-next 下一批开发 slice

decisions.point: live queue 为空后的下一步
decisions.chose: 先用 planning commit 创建可执行 backlog，再按 queue claim 实现并通过 workflow:done 收口
decisions.rationale: 本仓 dispatch truth 是 live queue + lease；queue 为空且无 lease 时应进入 next-batch planning commit，而不是手写临时任务。

decisions.chose: 使用 mainline agents install 安装 versioned managed block 到 AGENTS.md
decisions.rationale: mainline agents check 明确报告 AGENTS.md state=not_installed；managed block 只追加 Mainline 指针，不重写仓库已有 Browser Brain Loop 规则。

decisions.point: Skill install metadata 如何接入 runtime
decisions.chose: 在 core 层保留原始 management input，并给 ctx.skills.install 增加可选 payload 参数；BrowserVFS 写入保持后续 runtime-manager slice
decisions.rationale: core 只负责 validation/dispatch，不应在 normal skill invocation 中执行 setup hooks，也不应在 core 里直接写 VFS。
rejected: 在 normal skill invocation 中执行 setup hooks
把 BrowserVFS package writes 放进 packages/core

decisions.chose: 放弃 origin/main-based draft，按本轮 4 个 commit 精确重开 backfill intent 后再 seal
decisions.rationale: 原 draft 的 base 会把本轮之前的本地 ahead commits 也纳入 fingerprint，精确 commit list 避免污染团队记忆。

rejected.alternative: 直接 seal 原 int_b77aaa28 draft
rejected.reason: 该 draft base 是 origin/main，会把 ISSUE-168/169 与 mainline init 等既有 ahead commits 一并声明为本轮 /next 工作。

review_notes: 验证通过：mainline agents check --json、git diff --check、mainline preflight --json。
验证通过：bun run test -- packages/core/test/core.spec.ts；bun run typecheck；biome check core src/test 与 skill authoring doc。
ISSUE-170 和 ISSUE-171 均已 workflow:done 收口，lease 已释放，docs/workflow/live-queue.json 当前 entries 为空。

architectural_claims: Mainline repo guidance is now installed as a versioned managed block in AGENTS.md.
Skill control-plane management now preserves request payload for runtime-manager install metadata handling without executing setup hooks in core.
behavioral_changes: skills.install/enable/disable/uninstall validate skillId and pass the full input payload to manageSkill.
ctx.skills.install(skillId, input?) supports optional metadata/setupPlan forwarding while existing string lifecycle helpers still produce { skillId }.
live queue was rebuilt after each issue closeout and is empty after ISSUE-171.

api_changes.signature: skills.install capability input schema accepts optional setupPlan and metadata objects

security_implications: Core only preserves install metadata and still validates skillId; setup hooks are not executed during normal skill invocation, and BrowserVFS writes remain delegated to a future runtime-manager slice.
